concerns.text: SC-005 anchors to FR-007 ('frame findings as associational'), but the success criteria describes measuring the method's generality against the known BKT transition temperature. FR-007 is a framing/communication constraint, not a functional requirement for generality testing. SC-005 should anchor to FR-006 (bootstrap/resampling) or a new FR explicitly covering the XY model validation pipeline described in US-3.
